introLines.text: Vern, I was up at like 3 AM and I saw something outside my window. Couldn't sleep after.
I know this sounds crazy, but I woke up in the middle of the night and there was this light hovering outside.
Okay so I might have been half asleep, but I swear I saw something in the sky last night.

detailLines.text: It was this soft, pulsing light. Just hanging there above the treeline. I watched it for... I don't know, felt like forever.
I rubbed my eyes, Vern. Multiple times. It was still there. Orange-ish, maybe yellow. Moving slow.
No sound. That's what got me. At 3 AM everything is quiet and this thing made zero noise.

defenseLines.text: I wasn't dreaming. I got up, I got water, I looked again. Still there.
Yeah, I was tired. But I know the difference between a dream and reality. Mostly.
My dog was barking at the window too. Dogs don't bark at dreams, do they?

acceptanceLines.text: Thank god. I thought I was losing it. Haven't slept right since.
That's what I needed to hear. Maybe I'm not crazy after all.
Right, right. That makes me feel better.

conclusionLines.text: Thanks Vern. I just needed to tell someone who wouldn't laugh.
I'm gonna try to sleep tonight. Maybe with the curtains closed.
Okay, I feel better. Thanks for listening.
